response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (42%) is above our minimum threshold (65%) for outbound sharing in conservative mode, and our own critical state (37% SoC, 90 min to depletion) takes priority; geographic circle should route your request to higher-SoC peers instead.

user:

Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
